title: T-056 — UI: TEC-072 D365 Sync Audit Log
prompt: Build D365 sync audit log per §13.8 TEC-072. Per-run detail with diff view (records_processed/failed/error_summary). Match `d365_log_screen` design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:1025-1051. Reads d365_sync_jobs joined with audit drift entries. RED tests/ui/tec-072-d365-log.test.tsx. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-072-d365-log.test.tsx`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Per-run sync audit log with diff drilldown.
pipeline_inputs.details: Filters: direction, target_entity, status, date range. Row-click expands to drift entries.
acceptance_criteria: Given the log page renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:1025-1051, then column order, filter bar, and row-detail expansion match — structural + visual + interaction parity verified by RTL.
Given filter direction='pull', when applied, then rows narrow to pull jobs only.
Given a row has 0 errors, when expanded, then 'Clean run' state is shown.
test_strategy: RED tests for parity + filter behavior.
risk_red_lines: Do not surface payload details containing secrets.
